descriptionShort: Mike Gaber's overtime goal gives Humboldt Broncos 4-3 win over Richmond Sockeyes in Centennial Cup playoff Game 6.
descriptionLong: Mike Gaber scored at 3:31 of overtime to give the Humboldt Broncos a 4-3 victory over the Richmond Sockeyes on April 29, forcing a seventh deciding game in the Western Canada final. Bill McDougall scored twice for Humboldt while Paul Rutherford led Richmond with two goals. Humboldt's Bruce Hoffort made 42 saves as both teams were closely matched in shots, 46-45.
